title: Belt Drive Calculator & Engineering Guide - AluCalc

meta.title: Belt Drive Calculator & Engineering Guide - AluCalc | Professional Handbook
meta.description: Professional Belt Drive guide with ISO 5291 / Shigley formulas for length, wrap angle, and belt tension.

seo.h1: Belt Drive Calculator & Engineering Guide - AluCalc
seo.intro: Open belt drive analysis for flat and V-belt transmissions.
pitfalls: Ignoring V-belt groove angle in tension ratio
seo.step_by_step:
1. Enter pulley diameters and center distance.
2. Select belt type (flat or V-belt).
3. Review belt length, wrap angle, and tensions.
4. Adjust center distance if wrap angle is too low.
seo.practical: In mechanical power transmission, accurate belt drive sizing prevents slip and premature wear.
